canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>rain on glass</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { 
  background: #0a0a0f; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  width: 100vw; 
  height: 100vh;
}
canvas { 
  display: block; 
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
}
#bg { z-index: 1; }
#rain { z-index: 2; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="bg"></canvas>
<canvas id="rain"></canvas>
<script>
// Rain on Glass - water physics simulation with bokeh city lights
const bgCanvas = document.getElementById('bg');
const rainCanvas = document.getElementById('rain');
const bgCtx = bgCanvas.getContext('2d');
const ctx = rainCanvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H;
let mouseX = 0, mouseY = 0;
let wind = 0;
let targetWind = 0;

// Bokeh lights (blurred city behind glass)
const lights = [];
const lightColors = [
  'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.6)',   // cyan
  'rgba(255, 50, 150, 0.5)',  // pink
  'rgba(180, 100, 255, 0.4)', // purple
  'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)', // white
  'rgba(0, 200, 255, 0.5)',   // blue
  'rgba(255, 80, 180, 0.4)',  // hot pink
];

// Water droplets
const drops = [];
const trails = [];
const MAX_DROPS = 150;
const MAX_TRAILS = 300;

function resize() {
  W = window.innerWidth;
  H = window.innerHeight;
  bgCanvas.width = rainCanvas.width = W;
  bgCanvas.height = rainCanvas.height = H;
  
  // Regenerate bokeh lights
  lights.length = 0;
  const numLights = Math.floor((W * H) / 15000);
  for (let i = 0; i < numLights; i++) {
    lights.push({
      x: Math.random() * W,
      y: Math.random() * H,
      r: 20 + Math.random() * 80,
      color: lightColors[Math.floor(Math.random() * lightColors.length)],
      pulse: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
      pulseSpeed: 0.01 + Math.random() * 0.02
    });
  }
}

// Draw blurred bokeh background
function drawBackground(t) {
  bgCtx.fillStyle = '#0a0a12';
  bgCtx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Add subtle gradient
  const grad = bgCtx.createRadialGradient(W/2, H/2, 0, W/2, H/2, W * 0.7);
  grad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(30, 10, 40, 0.5)');
  grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(5, 5, 15, 0)');
  bgCtx.fillStyle = grad;
  bgCtx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Draw bokeh lights
  for (const light of lights) {
    light.pulse += light.pulseSpeed;
    const pulseFactor = 0.85 + 0.15 * Math.sin(light.pulse);
    const r = light.r * pulseFactor;
    
    const gradient = bgCtx.createRadialGradient(light.x, light.y, 0, light.x, light.y, r);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, light.color);
    gradient.addColorStop(0.4, light.color.replace(/[\d.]+\)$/, '0.2)'));
    gradient.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    
    bgCtx.beginPath();
    bgCtx.arc(light.x, light.y, r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    bgCtx.fillStyle = gradient;
    bgCtx.fill();
  }
  
  // Glass texture overlay
  bgCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 20, 0.3)';
  bgCtx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
}

class Drop {
  constructor(x, y, size) {
    this.x = x || Math.random() * W;
    this.y = y || -20;
    this.size = size || 2 + Math.random() * 4;
    this.vy = 0;
    this.vx = 0;
    this.gravity = 0.15 + this.size * 0.02;
    this.friction = 0.98;
    this.surfaceTension = 0.92;
    this.dead = false;
    this.stuckTime = 0;
    this.trail = [];
  }
  
  update() {
    // Wind effect
    this.vx += wind * 0.1;
    this.vx *= this.friction;
    
    // Gravity with some randomness (surface imperfections)
    this.vy += this.gravity;
    this.vy *= this.surfaceTension;
    
    // Random horizontal drift (water finding paths)
    if (Math.random() < 0.05) {
      this.vx += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
    }
    
    // Occasional stick (surface tension pause)
    if (Math.random() < 0.02 && this.vy > 0.5) {
      this.vy *= 0.3;
      this.stuckTime = 10 + Math.random() * 30;
    }
    
    if (this.stuckTime > 0) {
      this.stuckTime--;
      this.vy *= 0.8;
    }
    
    // Leave trail
    if (this.vy > 1 && Math.random() < 0.3) {
      trails.push({
        x: this.x,
        y: this.y,
        size: this.size * 0.3,
        alpha: 0.4,
        age: 0
      });
    }
    
    this.x += this.vx;
    this.y += this.vy;
    
    // Boundary check
    if (this.y > H + 20 || this.x < -20 || this.x > W + 20) {
      this.dead = true;
    }
  }
  
  draw() {
    // Main drop body - elongated when moving fast
    const stretch = Math.min(this.vy * 0.5, this.size);
    
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(this.x, this.y);
    
    // Drop shadow/refraction
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.ellipse(1, 1, this.size * 0.9, this.size * 0.9 + stretch * 0.5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)';
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Main drop
    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
      -this.size * 0.3, -this.size * 0.3, 0,
      0, 0, this.size
    );
    gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(200, 220, 255, 0.9)');
    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(100, 150, 200, 0.6)');
    gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(50, 80, 120, 0.4)');
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.ellipse(0, 0, this.size, this.size + stretch * 0.5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Highlight
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.ellipse(-this.size * 0.3, -this.size * 0.3, this.size * 0.3, this.size * 0.25, -0.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7)';
    ctx.fill();
    
    ctx.restore();
  }
  
  // Check collision with another drop
  collidesWith(other) {
    const dx = this.x - other.x;
    const dy = this.y - other.y;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    return dist < this.size + other.size;
  }
  
  // Merge with another drop
  merge(other) {
    // Combined area determines new size
    const area = Math.PI * this.size * this.size + Math.PI * other.size * other.size;
    const newSize = Math.sqrt(area / Math.PI);
    
    // Weighted position average
    const totalMass = this.size + other.size;
    this.x = (this.x * this.size + other.x * other.size) / totalMass;
    this.y = (this.y * this.size + other.y * other.size) / totalMass;
    
    // Combined momentum
    this.vx = (this.vx * this.size + other.vx * other.size) / totalMass;
    this.vy = (this.vy * this.size + other.vy * other.size) / totalMass;
    
    this.size = Math.min(newSize, 15); // Cap size
    other.dead = true;
    
    // Splash effect
    if (newSize > 8) {
      for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        trails.push({
          x: this.x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * this.size,
          y: this.y + (Math.random() - 0.5) * this.size,
          size: 1 + Math.random() * 2,
          alpha: 0.5,
          age: 0
        });
      }
    }
  }
}

function spawnDrop() {
  if (drops.length < MAX_DROPS && Math.random() < 0.15) {
    drops.push(new Drop());
  }
}

function updateTrails() {
  for (let i = trails.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const t = trails[i];
    t.age++;
    t.alpha -= 0.005;
    if (t.alpha <= 0) {
      trails.splice(i, 1);
    }
  }
  
  // Limit trails
  while (trails.length > MAX_TRAILS) {
    trails.shift();
  }
}

function drawTrails() {
  for (const t of trails) {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(t.x, t.y, t.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(150, 180, 220, ${t.alpha * 0.5})`;
    ctx.fill();
  }
}

function handleCollisions() {
  for (let i = 0; i < drops.length; i++) {
    if (drops[i].dead) continue;
    for (let j = i + 1; j < drops.length; j++) {
      if (drops[j].dead) continue;
      if (drops[i].collidesWith(drops[j])) {
        drops[i].merge(drops[j]);
      }
    }
  }
}

function update(t) {
  // Smooth wind transition
  wind += (targetWind - wind) * 0.05;
  
  // Spawn new drops
  spawnDrop();
  
  // Update drops
  for (const drop of drops) {
    drop.update();
  }
  
  // Handle collisions/merging
  handleCollisions();
  
  // Remove dead drops
  for (let i = drops.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (drops[i].dead) drops.splice(i, 1);
  }
  
  // Update trails
  updateTrails();
}

function draw(t) {
  // Clear rain canvas
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Draw background bokeh
  drawBackground(t);
  
  // Glass refraction distortion layer
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(20, 25, 35, 0.1)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Draw water trails
  drawTrails();
  
  // Draw drops
  for (const drop of drops) {
    drop.draw();
  }
  
  // Subtle vignette
  const vignette = ctx.createRadialGradient(W/2, H/2, H * 0.3, W/2, H/2, H);
  vignette.addColorStop(0, 'transparent');
  vignette.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)');
  ctx.fillStyle = vignette;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
}

function animate(t) {
  update(t);
  draw(t);
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

// Mouse interaction - creates wind based on horizontal movement
let lastMouseX = 0;
document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  mouseY = e.clientY;
  
  // Calculate wind from mouse movement
  const dx = mouseX - lastMouseX;
  targetWind = dx * 0.05;
  targetWind = Math.max(-2, Math.min(2, targetWind));
  
  lastMouseX = mouseX;
});

// Click to add drops
document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
    const d = new Drop(
      e.clientX + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 50,
      e.clientY + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 50,
      3 + Math.random() * 5
    );
    d.vy = Math.random() * 2;
    drops.push(d);
  }
});

// Touch support
document.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  const dx = touch.clientX - lastMouseX;
  targetWind = dx * 0.05;
  targetWind = Math.max(-2, Math.min(2, targetWind));
  lastMouseX = touch.clientX;
});

document.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
    const d = new Drop(
      touch.clientX + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 50,
      touch.clientY + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 50,
      3 + Math.random() * 5
    );
    d.vy = Math.random() * 2;
    drops.push(d);
  }
});

// Reset wind when mouse leaves
document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
  targetWind = 0;
});

// Init
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// Start with some drops already on screen
for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
  const d = new Drop(Math.random() * W, Math.random() * H * 0.8, 2 + Math.random() * 4);
  d.vy = Math.random();
  drops.push(d);
}

animate(0);
</script>
</body>
</html>
